landing.heroSub: Customers scan and have their receipt instantly. No app, no email, no paper.
landing.tap1: You ring up the sale as usual
landing.tap2: The customer scans at the counter
landing.review1: One tap to leave a review
landing.review2: Right at the moment of purchase
landing.loyalty1: A loyalty card they'll never lose
landing.vat1: VAT per rate on every receipt
landing.vat3: Sealed and can't be altered afterwards
landing.oldWayItems: Printer · paper rolls · stamp cards · review stand
landing.newWayBody: One tile at the counter replaces all of it. And the paper.
landing.priceNote: Free trial period. You pay only once it works for you. Cancel anytime.
landing.businessesTitle: Works for every type of business.
landing.businessesSub: If you take payments and print receipts, Tapbon works for you.
landing.biz2Body: Loyalty that turns into repeat sales.
landing.biz3Body: Professional receipts, return visits via the loyalty card.
landing.biz5Body: Keep customers informed and coming back.
landing.biz6Body: Simple, secure receipts for every visit.
landing.missionBody1: Every year, an estimated 300 billion paper receipts are printed around the world. A third gets scrunched up and binned on the spot. The rest often ends up in landfill.
landing.missionBody2: No paper. No printer. No bin. Just a better way to issue receipts. For your business, your customers, and the planet.
landing.faqTitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
landing.faq1Q: Will this work with my POS system?
landing.faq1A: Yes. Tapbon runs alongside your POS and requires no integration. You enter the sale in Tapbon in seconds.
landing.faq2Q: Do my customers need to download anything?
landing.faq2A: No. The receipt opens directly in the phone's browser. No login, no app, no email.
landing.faq3Q: Are the receipts valid for tax records and VAT?
landing.faq3A: Every receipt shows VAT per rate and the CVR number, and is digitally sealed at issue so it can't be altered afterwards.
landing.faq4A: Everything is hosted in the EU (Sweden). No trackers on the receipt page, and customer data is stored only with consent. GDPR from day one.
landing.faq5A: Yes. No lock-in, and the pilot period is free until it works for you.
landing.euTitle: Your data stays in the EU.
landing.euBody: Everything is hosted in the EU (Sweden). No trackers on the receipt page. GDPR from day one, and customer data is stored only with consent.
landing.footerTagline: The smart tile that replaces paper receipt printers. Danish owned.
